creator: tlj@redowl.net
text:
----- Forwarded message from tlj <tlj@redowl.net> -----

Date: Sat, 3 Sep 2011 15:53:34 -0400
To: Pawe? P?kala <c0rn@o2.pl>
From: tlj <tlj@redowl.net>
Cc: pawel@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/156313: [patch][new port] astro/gkrellsun2 (Gkrellm2 Plugin)


The location of the source file has changed since the PR was created.

The source can now be found here:

 http://sourceforge.net/projects/gkrellsun/files/gkrellsun%20gkrellm-2.2/1.0.0/gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz

-tlj



On a remote moon of Endor, Pawe? P?kala's voice echoed:
> Does not fetch form me:
> 
> [corn:corn/devel/gkrellsun2]# make makesum
> ===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
> => gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist
> in /usr/ports/distfiles/. => Attempting to fetch
> http://sourceforge.net/projects/gkrellsun/gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz fetch:
> http://sourceforge.net/projects/gkrellsun/gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz: Not
> Found => Attempting to fetch
> ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz
> fetch:
> ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/gkrellsun-1.0.0.tar.gz:
> File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access) => Couldn't fetch it
> - please try to retrieve this => port manually
> into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again. *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /home/corn/devel/gkrellsun2.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /home/corn/devel/gkrellsun2.
> 
> 
> -- 
> pozdrawiam / with regards
> Pawe? P?kala

----- End forwarded message -----
